grant_title: New Grant Program for Small Businesses Affected by Devastating Fire in the Bronx
eligible_applicant_type: Small businesses destroyed in a five-alarm fire on March 13, 2025, along Jerome Avenue in the Bronx
geographic_restrictions: Bronx, New York City, New York
project_area: Business recovery and restoration (renovations, equipment, inventory restocking, employee onboarding)
demographic_requirements: Businesses must have been operating and destroyed in the specified fire on March 13, 2025
eligibility_summary: Six businesses destroyed in the March 13, 2025 fire on Jerome Avenue in the Bronx are eligible for grants up to $16,000 each. Applicants must submit applications online to SBS by February 27, 2026, and verify eligibility. Grants can be used for renovations, equipment, inventory, and hiring.
